DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Plaintiff TONY FU (Tel: 415-867-5973) appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JAMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: Defendant JAMS, Inc.'s demurrer to complaint is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on September 6, 2019.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances at 2:00 P.M. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant JAMS, Inc.'s demurrer to plaintiff Fu's complaint is off calendar. The case is stayed based on Mr. Fu's notice of bankruptcy filing. Mr. Fu's claim is now part of the bankruptcy estate and it is unclear whether the trustee is aware of the claim. Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(=302/SMM)
